2→ 3→ 4→ 5→# MemoryTree Workflow 6→ 7→**Persistent, Git-tracked project memory for AI coding assistants.** 8→ 9→[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-blue.svg)](LICENSE) 10→[![Python 3.11+](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3.11%2B-3776AB.svg?logo=python&logoColor=white)](https://www.python.org/) 11→[![Claude Code](https://img.shields.io/badge/Claude_Code-Skill-cc785c.svg?logo=anthropic&logoColor=white)](https://claude.ai/claude-code) 12→[![Platform](https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-macOS%20%7C%20Linux%20%7C%20Windows-lightgrey.svg)](#requirements) 13→ 14→

15→ Install  •  16→ Usage  •  17→ Features  •  18→ Heartbeat  •  19→ Scripts  •  20→ Docs 21→

22→ 23→
24→ 25→--- 26→ 27→## What It Does 28→ 29→MemoryTree gives AI coding assistants (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI) a structured memory layer that survives across sessions: 30→ 31→| | Feature | Description | 32→|---|---------|-------------| 33→| :dart: | **Goals** | Track your project's north star across sessions | 34→| :white_check_mark: | **Todos** | Version-bound task lists that stay in sync with goals | 35→| :speech_balloon: | **Chat Logs** | Append-only session records for full traceability | 36→| :books: | **Knowledge** | Durable notes, specs, and architecture decisions (also stored in goals when scope-relevant) | 37→| :inbox_tray: | **Transcripts** | Import and archive AI chat history from Codex, Claude Code, and Gemini CLI | 38→ 39→All stored as plain Markdown files under `Memory/`, tracked by Git, minimal dependencies. 40→ 41→## Install 42→ 43→```bash 44→git clone https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow ~/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow 45→``` 46→ 47→On Windows (Git Bash): 48→```bash 49→git clone https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow "$USERPROFILE/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow" 50→``` 51→ 52→## Usage 53→ 54→In any Claude Code session, run: 55→ 56→``` 57→/memorytree-workflow 58→``` 59→ 60→The skill will immediately: 61→1. **Detect** — check if the current repo has MemoryTree installed 62→2. **Alert** — display pending notifications from `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` 63→3. **Init** — if missing, scaffold `AGENTS.md` and `Memory/` folders 64→4. **Upgrade** — if partial, add missing pieces without overwriting existing policy 65→5. **Maintain** — if installed, read the active goal/todo and report current state 66→ 67→No manual confirmation needed — the skill acts on the detection result immediately. 68→ 69→## Architecture 70→ 71→### Per-Repository Structure 72→ 73→After initialization, your repo will have: 74→ 75→``` 76→AGENTS.md # AI behavior rules for this repo 77→Memory/ 78→ 01_goals/ # Versioned project goals 79→ 02_todos/ # Task lists bound to goals 80→ 03_chat_logs/ # Append-only session logs 81→ 04_knowledge/ # (optional) Durable project notes 82→ 05_archive/ # (optional) Retired goals/todos 83→ 06_transcripts/ # (optional) AI chat history archive 84→ clean/ # Cleaned Markdown indexes 85→ manifests/ # Import metadata 86→ raw/ # Raw transcript mirrors 87→``` 88→ 89→### Global Directory (`~/.memorytree/`) 90→ 91→Cross-project shared state: 92→ 93→``` 94→~/.memorytree/ 95→ config.toml # User-level settings 96→ alerts.json # Pending notifications 97→ heartbeat.lock # Single-instance lock 98→ logs/ # Heartbeat execution logs 99→ transcripts/ # Global transcript archive 100→ raw/ # By client/project/year/month 101→ clean/ # Cleaned Markdown 102→ index/ 103→ sessions.jsonl # Session metadata 104→ search.sqlite # Full-text search index 105→``` 106→ 107→For the full schema see [`references/global-configuration.md`](references/global-configuration.md). 108→ 109→## Features 110→ 111→### Memory Management 112→ 113→| Memory Type | Behavior | 114→|-------------|----------| 115→| **Goals** | Changed only after explicit user confirmation of a scope or requirement change. Versioned. | 116→| **Todos** | Kept in sync with the active goal. Updated when progress changes or next task becomes clearer. | 117→| **Chat Logs** | Append-only. Never rewritten or deleted. | 118→| **Knowledge** | Stores architecture decisions, product ideas, operating constraints. Goals may also hold scope-relevant items. | 119→| **Archive** | Stale context moved here or to knowledge files to keep active files concise. | 120→ 121→### Multi-Client Transcript Import 122→ 123→Import AI chat history from three clients: 124→ 125→| Client | Source | 126→|--------|--------| 127→| **Codex** | `~/.codex/sessions/**/rollout-*.jsonl` | 128→| **Claude Code** | `transcript_path` if exposed; otherwise `~/.claude/projects//*.jsonl` | 129→| **Gemini CLI** | Saved chats first; checkpoints under `~/.gemini/tmp//checkpoints` if enabled | 130→ 131→Key principles: 132→ 133→- Raw transcripts preserved unchanged as source of truth 134→- Cleaned Markdown generated by **deterministic code** (not model tokens) 135→- Current repo only stores transcripts belonging to this project; others go to global archive only 136→- First import asks once whether raw transcripts may be committed to the repo 137→ 138→### Cross-Project Search 139→ 140→When searching all memories or chat history: 141→ 142→1. Query `search.sqlite` for fast full-text lookup 143→2. Use `sessions.jsonl` for session-level metadata filtering (client, project, date range) 144→3. Load matching cleaned Markdown for context; confirm exact wording against raw transcripts 145→4. Combine with the current repo's `Memory/` files 146→5. Fall back to scanning `clean/` directory if the index does not exist 147→ 148→### Session Continuity 149→ 150→When you open a new session and want to continue where you left off, ask MemoryTree to show your most recent conversation: 151→ 152→> "Look at my last chat" / "看看我最近的聊天" / "Continue where I left off" 153→ 154→The skill will: 155→ 156→1. **Instant sync** — immediately scan all three client directories (not waiting for the scheduled heartbeat) 157→2. **Locate** — find the latest session for the current project across Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI 158→3. **Summarize** — generate a continuation summary: what was discussed, what was tried, and what remains unresolved 159→4. **Handoff** — you can say "continue" and pick up exactly where the previous session stopped 160→ 161→This works **cross-client**: a Codex session can be recovered from Claude Code, and vice versa. 162→ 163→For details see [`references/transcript-archive.md`](references/transcript-archive.md) and [`references/heartbeat-scheduling.md`](references/heartbeat-scheduling.md). 164→ 165→### Git Safety 166→ 167→MemoryTree follows strict isolation rules to never interfere with your repo's workflow: 168→ 169→| Rule | Description | 170→|------|-------------| 171→| File isolation | Only stages/commits `Memory/**` (excluding `raw/` until approved) and `AGENTS.md` (when managed by MemoryTree) | 172→| Branch isolation | Uses dedicated branch `memorytree/--` | 173→| Commit format | `memorytree(): ` or repo-compatible equivalent | 174→| PR isolation | Separate PR for MemoryTree-only changes | 175→| Auto-merge | Only when repo still enforces its review and CI checks | 176→| Auto-push | On by default; skips if no remote; fast-forward only | 177→| Protected branches | Never overrides branch protection or CI rules | 178→ 179→The skill stops and asks before proceeding in 8 scenarios: mixed product code, AGENTS.md conflicts, unclear target branch, repo forbids bot pushes, CI conflicts, unknown raw transcript permission, cross-project transcripts, or protected branch refusal. 180→ 181→For the full policy see [`references/git-policy.md`](references/git-policy.md). 182→ 183→### Sensitive Info Scanning 184→ 185→During transcript cleaning, the heartbeat scans for API keys, passwords, tokens, and other secrets: 186→ 187→- Matches are logged as warnings and written to `alerts.json` 188→- **No automatic deletion or redaction** — the user decides how to handle them 189→ 190→### Locale Support 191→ 192→| Feature | Description | 193→|---------|-------------| 194→| Templates | English (`en`) and Simplified Chinese (`zh-cn`) | 195→| Auto-detect | Detects language from repo content first, then system locale | 196→| Reply language | Follows user explicit request > message language > repo locale > template locale > `en` | 197→| Non-destructive | Never rewrites existing files just to translate them | 198→ 199→### Environment Adaptation 200→ 201→MemoryTree does not assume the target repo has a Python environment: 202→ 203→``` 204→Prefer uv run python → fall back to system python → fall back to direct template scaffolding 205→``` 206→ 207→Never auto-creates `.venv` or `pyproject.toml` inside the project. 208→ 209→## Background Heartbeat 210→ 211→The heartbeat automates transcript discovery, import, cleaning, commit, and push without consuming model tokens or requiring human intervention. 212→ 213→**Execution flow**: 214→ 215→``` 216→Acquire lock → Load config.toml → Iterate projects → Discover → Import 217→→ Clean → Commit → (auto_push) Push → Release lock → Exit 218→``` 219→ 220→### Install the daemon 221→ 222→```bash 223→memorytree-daemon install 224→``` 225→ 226→### CLI commands 227→ 228→| Command | Description | 229→|-----------------------------|-------------| 230→| `memorytree-daemon install` | Register the heartbeat with the OS scheduler (cron / launchd / Task Scheduler). | 231→| `memorytree-daemon uninstall` | Remove the scheduled heartbeat task. | 232→| `memorytree-daemon run-once` | Run a single heartbeat cycle immediately. | 233→| `memorytree-daemon watch` | Continuous loop for development and debugging only. | 234→| `memorytree-daemon status` | Show registration state and last execution result. | 235→ 236→### Key settings (`~/.memorytree/config.toml`) 237→ 238→| Setting | Default | Description | 239→|----------------------|----------|-------------| 240→| `auto_push` | `true` | Push to remote after each commit. Skips if no remote is configured. | 241→| `heartbeat_interval` | `"5m"` | Interval between heartbeat executions. | 242→| `log_level` | `"info"` | Log verbosity (`debug`, `info`, `warn`, `error`). | 243→ 244→### Design constraints 245→ 246→- Single execution, stateless, idempotent — safe to re-run at any interval 247→- One computer = one scheduled heartbeat task 248→- Will not silently register — always confirms before `install` 249→ 250→For details see [`references/heartbeat-scheduling.md`](references/heartbeat-scheduling.md) and [`references/global-configuration.md`](references/global-configuration.md). 251→ 252→## Design Principles 253→ 254→| Principle | How | 255→|-----------|-----| 256→| **Zero intrusion** | Never changes the repo's branch model, CI, or review process | 257→| **Minimal dependencies** | Scripts target Python standard library; no third-party packages required at install time | 258→| **Deterministic** | Transcript cleaning done by code, not model tokens | 259→| **Single source of truth** | Each concept defined in one reference file, others cross-reference | 260→| **Spec-driven** | Reference docs define the contract; code implements it faithfully | 261→| **User asset** | Memory belongs to the user; auto_push on by default to prevent local data loss | 262→ 263→## Scripts 264→ 265→All scripts live under `scripts/` and target Python 3.11+ stdlib only (no third-party packages). 266→ 267→### Entry Points 268→ 269→| Script | Purpose | 270→|--------|---------| 271→| [`heartbeat.py`](scripts/heartbeat.py) | Background heartbeat — discover, import, clean, commit, push transcripts | 272→| [`memorytree_daemon.py`](scripts/memorytree_daemon.py) | Daemon lifecycle manager: `install` / `uninstall` / `run-once` / `watch` / `status` | 273→| [`recall-session.py`](scripts/recall-session.py) | On-demand transcript sync and latest session recall for cross-session context recovery | 274→| [`init-memorytree.py`](scripts/init-memorytree.py) | Scaffold `Memory/` and `AGENTS.md` for a new repository | 275→| [`upgrade-memorytree.py`](scripts/upgrade-memorytree.py) | Add missing MemoryTree pieces to a partial repository | 276→| [`import-transcripts.py`](scripts/import-transcripts.py) | Import one transcript into repo mirror and global archive | 277→| [`discover-transcripts.py`](scripts/discover-transcripts.py) | Scan local client stores and mirror matching transcripts | 278→| [`detect-memorytree-locale.py`](scripts/detect-memorytree-locale.py) | Print the effective locale for a target repository | 279→ 280→### Internal Modules 281→ 282→| Module | Purpose | 283→|--------|---------| 284→| [`_transcript_utils.py`](scripts/_transcript_utils.py) | Transcript parsing (Codex/Claude/Gemini), import, SQLite indexing, discovery | 285→| [`_config_utils.py`](scripts/_config_utils.py) | Load/validate `~/.memorytree/config.toml` with `tomllib` | 286→| [`_alert_utils.py`](scripts/_alert_utils.py) | Manage `alerts.json` — dedup, threshold-based alerting, failure counts | 287→| [`_lock_utils.py`](scripts/_lock_utils.py) | PID-based lock file with atomic creation and stale lock detection | 288→| [`_log_utils.py`](scripts/_log_utils.py) | Date-rotated file logging to `~/.memorytree/logs/` | 289→| [`_scaffold_utils.py`](scripts/_scaffold_utils.py) | Template rendering and directory scaffolding helpers | 290→| [`_locale_utils.py`](scripts/_locale_utils.py) | Locale detection and normalization | 291→ 292→## Reference Docs 293→ 294→| File | Purpose | 295→|------|---------| 296→| [`references/project-detection.md`](references/project-detection.md) | Detect install state | 297→| [`references/memory-layout.md`](references/memory-layout.md) | Folder and file naming rules | 298→| [`references/update-rules.md`](references/update-rules.md) | When to version goals, todos, and session logs | 299→| [`references/git-policy.md`](references/git-policy.md) | Git defaults, auto-push, and policy merge | 300→| [`references/heartbeat-scheduling.md`](references/heartbeat-scheduling.md) | Heartbeat architecture, daemon CLI, execution flow | 301→| [`references/global-configuration.md`](references/global-configuration.md) | `~/.memorytree/` layout, `config.toml` schema, `alerts.json` format | 302→| [`references/transcript-archive.md`](references/transcript-archive.md) | Transcript archival, cleaning, search, and upload rules | 303→| [`references/locale-selection.md`](references/locale-selection.md) | Locale choice rules | 304→| [`references/response-language.md`](references/response-language.md) | Reply-language precedence | 305→| [`references/execution-environment.md`](references/execution-environment.md) | How to run scripts without a project-local Python environment | 306→| [`references/upgrade-path.md`](references/upgrade-path.md) | Safe adoption flow for partial repos | 307→ 308→## Update 309→ 310→```bash 311→cd ~/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow && git pull 312→```     77→class SlugifyTests(unittest.TestCase):
    78→    def test_simple_name(self) -> None:
    79→        self.assertEqual(slugify("demo-repo"), "demo-repo")
    80→
    81→    def test_spaces_converted(self) -> None:
    82→        self.assertEqual(slugify("My Project Name"), "my-project-name")
    83→
    84→    def test_special_chars_stripped(self) -> None:
    85→        self.assertEqual(slugify("project@v2!"), "project-v2")
    86→
    87→    def test_empty_returns_fallback(self) -> None:
    88→        self.assertEqual(slugify("", fallback="default"), "default")
    89→
    90→    def test_all_non_ascii_returns_fallback(self) -> None:

    93→    def test_mixed_ascii_non_ascii(self) -> None:

    95→        self.assertEqual(result, "my--v2")
    96→
    97→    def test_leading_trailing_dots_stripped(self) -> None:
    98→        self.assertEqual(slugify("..hello.."), "hello")

   101→class NormalizeTimestampTests(unittest.TestCase):
   102→    def test_unix_float(self) -> None:

   107→    def test_unix_int(self) -> None:

   111→    def test_iso_string(self) -> None:

   503→            TranscriptMessage(role="assistant", text="Second", timestamp="2026-03-14T10:00:01Z"),
   504→            TranscriptMessage(role="user", text="First", timestamp="2026-03-14T10:00:00Z"),

   506→        result = deduplicate_messages(msgs)

   509→        self.assertEqual(result[1].text, "Second")

   515→        msgs = [TranscriptMessage(role="user", text="Hello", timestamp="2026-03-14T10:00:00Z")]
   516→        result = deduplicate_messages(msgs)
   517→        self.assertIsNot(result, msgs)

1→#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2→"""
     3→Initialize a minimal MemoryTree workspace inside an arbitrary repository.
     4→"""
     5→
     6→from __future__ import annotations
     7→
     8→import argparse
     9→from pathlib import Path
    10→
    11→from _scaffold_utils import (
    12→    build_datetime,
    13→    create_memory_dirs,
    14→    find_external_policy_sources,
    15→    resolve_scaffold_paths,
    16→    resolve_template_dir,
    17→    scaffold_content_files,
    18→    write_template,
    19→)
    20→
    21→
    22→def main() -> int:
    23→    args = parse_args()
    24→    root = Path(args.root).resolve()
    25→    if not root.exists():
    26→        raise SystemExit(f"root does not exist: {root}")
    27→    if args.skip_agents:
    28→        raise SystemExit(
    29→            "--skip-agents is not supported for fresh initialization. "
    30→            "Use upgrade-memorytree.py when preserving or merging an existing AGENTS.md."
    31→        )
    32→
    33→    agents_path = root / "AGENTS.md"
    34→    if agents_path.exists():
    35→        raise SystemExit(
    36→            "AGENTS.md already exists. Use upgrade-memorytree.py to preserve or merge existing repo policy."
    37→        )
    38→
    39→    policy_sources = find_external_policy_sources(root)
    40→    if policy_sources:
    41→        preview = ", ".join(policy_sources[:3])
    42→        if len(policy_sources) > 3:
    43→            preview += ", ..."
    44→        raise SystemExit(
    45→            f"External repo policy files detected ({preview}). "
    46→            "Use upgrade-memorytree.py to preserve host commit and PR rules."
    47→        )
    48→
    49→    skill_root = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
    50→    templates = resolve_template_dir(skill_root, root, args.locale)
    51→    dt = build_datetime(args.date, args.time)
    52→
    53→    create_memory_dirs(root)
    54→    paths = resolve_scaffold_paths(root, dt)
    55→    scaffold_content_files(paths, templates, args.goal_summary, args.project_name, args.force)
    56→    write_template(templates / "agents.md", agents_path, args.force, {})
    57→
    58→    return 0
    59→
    60→
    61→def parse_args() -> argparse.Namespace:

1→#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2→"""
     3→Discover local Codex, Claude Code, and Gemini transcript sources and import them
     4→into MemoryTree using deterministic code-based cleaning.
     5→"""
     6→
     7→from __future__ import annotations
     8→
     9→import argparse
    10→import json
    11→from pathlib import Path
    12→
    13→from _transcript_discover import (
    14→    default_global_transcript_root,
    15→    discover_source_files,
    16→    infer_project_slug,
    17→    transcript_matches_repo,
    18→)
    19→from _transcript_import import import_transcript, transcript_has_content
    20→from _transcript_parse import CLIENTS, parse_transcript, slugify
    21→
    22→
    23→def main() -> int:
    24→    args = parse_args()
    25→    root = Path(args.root).resolve()
    26→    if not root.exists():
    27→        raise SystemExit(f"root does not exist: {root}")
    28→
    29→    repo_slug = slugify(args.project_name.strip() or root.name, fallback="project")
    30→    global_root = resolve_global_root(args.global_root)
    31→    requested_clients = CLIENTS if args.client == "all" else {args.client}
    32→    discovered = discover_source_files(requested_clients)
    33→
    34→    results: list[dict[str, object]] = []
    35→    skipped: list[dict[str, str]] = []
    36→
    37→    for client, source in discovered:
    38→        if args.limit and len(results) >= args.limit:
    39→            break
    40→        try:
    41→            parsed = parse_transcript(client, source)
    42→        except Exception as exc:
    43→            skipped.append(
    44→                {
    45→                    "client": client,
    46→                    "source": source.as_posix(),
    47→                    "reason": "parse-error",
    48→                    "error": summarize_exception(exc),
    49→                }
    50→            )
    51→            continue
    52→
    53→        candidate_project = infer_project_slug(parsed)
    54→        matches_current_repo = transcript_matches_repo(parsed, root, repo_slug)
    55→        if not transcript_has_content(parsed):
    56→            skipped.append(
    57→                {
    58→                    "client": client,
    59→                    "source": source.as_posix(),
    60→                    "reason": "no-importable-content",
    61→                    "project": candidate_project,
    62→                }
    63→            )
    64→            continue
    65→
    66→        if args.scope == "current-project" and not matches_current_repo:
    67→            skipped.append(
    68→                {
    69→                    "client": client,
    70→                    "source": source.as_posix(),
    71→                    "reason": "unrelated-project",
    72→                    "project": candidate_project,
    73→                }
    74→            )
    75→            continue
    76→
    77→        try:
    78→            result = import_transcript(
    79→                parsed=parsed,
    80→                root=root,
    81→                global_root=global_root,
    82→                project_slug=repo_slug if matches_current_repo else candidate_project,
    83→                raw_upload_permission=args.raw_upload_permission if matches_current_repo else "not-applicable",
    84→                mirror_to_repo=matches_current_repo,
    85→            )
    86→        except Exception as exc:
    87→            skipped.append(
    88→                {
    89→                    "client": client,
    90→                    "source": source.as_posix(),
    91→                    "reason": "import-error",
    92→                    "project": candidate_project,
    93→                    "error": summarize_exception(exc),
    94→                }
    95→            )
    96→            continue
    97→        result["matches_current_repo"] = matches_current_repo
    98→        results.append(result)

1→#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2→"""
     3→Upgrade a repository to MemoryTree without overwriting existing repo policy files.
     4→"""
     5→
     6→from __future__ import annotations
     7→
     8→import argparse
     9→import json
    10→import re
    11→from pathlib import Path
    12→
    13→from _locale_utils import normalize_locale
    14→from _scaffold_utils import (
    15→    build_datetime,
    16→    create_memory_dirs,
    17→    find_external_policy_sources,
    18→    find_latest_chat_log_file,
    19→    find_latest_goal_file,
    20→    find_latest_todo_file,
    21→    resolve_scaffold_paths,
    22→    resolve_template_dir,
    23→    scaffold_content_files,
    24→    write_template,
    25→)
    26→
    27→
    28→def main() -> int:
    29→    args = parse_args()
    30→    root = Path(args.root).resolve()
    31→    if not root.exists():
    32→        raise SystemExit(f"root does not exist: {root}")
    33→
    34→    skill_root = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
    35→    templates = resolve_template_dir(skill_root, root, args.locale)
    36→    effective_locale = normalize_locale(args.locale, root)
    37→    initial_state = detect_state(root)
    38→
    39→    dt = build_datetime(args.date, args.time)
    40→
    41→    created_dirs = create_memory_dirs(root)
    42→    paths = resolve_scaffold_paths(root, dt)
    43→    created_files, preserved_files = scaffold_content_files(
    44→        paths, templates, args.goal_summary, args.project_name, force=False,
    45→    )
    46→
    47→    agents_path = root / "AGENTS.md"
    48→    agents_action = "preserved_existing"
    49→    if not agents_path.exists():
    50→        if write_template(templates / "agents.md", agents_path, False, {}):
    51→            created_files.append("AGENTS.md")
    52→            agents_action = "created"
    53→    else:
    54→        preserved_files.append("AGENTS.md")
    55→    merge_required = agents_action == "preserved_existing" and needs_agents_merge(agents_path)
    56→
    57→    result = {
    58→        "state_before": initial_state,
    59→        "state_after": detect_state(root),
    60→        "requested_locale": args.locale,
    61→        "effective_locale": effective_locale,
    62→        "created_dirs": created_dirs,
    63→        "created_files": created_files,
    64→        "preserved_files": preserved_files,
    65→        "agents_action": agents_action,
    66→        "agents_merge_required": merge_required,
    67→    }
    68→
    69→    if args.format == "json":
    70→        print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False))
    71→    else:
    72→        print(format_result_text(result))
    73→    return 0
    74→
    75→
    76→def parse_args() -> argparse.Namespace:
    77→    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Upgrade a repository to MemoryTree safely.")
    78→    parser.add_argument("--root", default=".", help="Target repository root.")
    79→    parser.add_argument("--project-name", default="this project", help="Project name used in generated chat logs.")
    80→    parser.add_argument(
    81→        "--goal-summary",
    82→        default="Describe the long-term project goal here.",
    83→        help="Fallback north-star summary when a goal file must be created.",
    84→    )
    85→    parser.add_argument("--locale", default="auto", help="Requested locale: auto, en, or zh-cn.")
    86→    parser.add_argument("--date", default="", help="Override date as YYYY-MM-DD for deterministic runs.")
    87→    parser.add_argument(
    88→        "--time",
    89→        default="",
    90→        help="Override time as HH:MM. If --date is omitted, use the current local date.",
    91→    )
    92→    parser.add_argument("--format", choices=("text", "json"), default="text", help="Output format.")
    93→    return parser.parse_args()
    94→
    95→
    96→def detect_state(root: Path) -> str:
    97→    memory_dir = root / "Memory"
    98→    goal_dir = root / "Memory" / "01_goals"
    99→    todo_dir = root / "Memory" / "02_todos"
   100→    chat_dir = root / "Memory" / "03_chat_logs"

1→#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2→"""
     3→Import one local AI transcript into MemoryTree using deterministic code-based
     4→cleaning. Current-project sources mirror into both the repo and the user-level
     5→global archive; unrelated sources archive globally only.
     6→"""
     7→
     8→from __future__ import annotations
     9→
    10→import argparse
    11→import json
    12→from pathlib import Path
    13→
    14→from _transcript_discover import (
    15→    default_global_transcript_root,
    16→    infer_project_slug,
    17→    transcript_matches_repo,
    18→)
    19→from _transcript_import import import_transcript, transcript_has_content
    20→from _transcript_parse import CLIENTS, infer_client, parse_transcript, slugify
    21→
    22→
    23→def main() -> int:
    24→    args = parse_args()
    25→    root = Path(args.root).resolve()
    26→    source = Path(args.source).resolve()
    27→    if not root.exists():
    28→        raise SystemExit(f"root does not exist: {root}")
    29→    if not source.exists():
    30→        raise SystemExit(f"source transcript does not exist: {source}")
    31→
    32→    client = infer_client(args.client, source)
    33→    global_root = resolve_global_root(args.global_root)
    34→    repo_slug = slugify(args.project_name.strip() or root.name, fallback="project")
    35→
    36→    parsed = parse_transcript(client, source)
    37→    if not transcript_has_content(parsed):
    38→        raise SystemExit(f"source transcript does not contain any importable messages or tool events: {source}")
    39→    detected_project = infer_project_slug(parsed)
    40→    matches_current_repo = transcript_matches_repo(parsed, root, repo_slug)
    41→    result = import_transcript(
    42→        parsed=parsed,
    43→        root=root,
    44→        global_root=global_root,
    45→        project_slug=repo_slug if matches_current_repo else detected_project,
    46→        raw_upload_permission=args.raw_upload_permission if matches_current_repo else "not-applicable",
    47→        mirror_to_repo=matches_current_repo,
    48→    )
    49→    result["matches_current_repo"] = matches_current_repo
    50→    result["detected_project"] = detected_project
    51→
    52→    if args.format == "json":
    53→        print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False))
    54→    else:
    55→        print(format_result_text(result))
    56→    return 0
    57→
    58→
    59→def parse_args() -> argparse.Namespace:
    60→    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Import one local transcript into MemoryTree archives.")
    61→    parser.add_argument("--root", default=".", help="Target repository root.")
    62→    parser.add_argument("--source", required=True, help="Raw transcript source file path.")
    63→    parser.add_argument(
    64→        "--client",
    65→        choices=("auto", *sorted(CLIENTS)),
    66→        default="auto",
    67→        help="Transcript client family.",
    68→    )
    69→    parser.add_argument(
    70→        "--project-name",
    71→        default="",
    72→        help="Project label used for the global transcript archive. Defaults to the repo folder name.",
    73→    )
    74→    parser.add_argument(
    75→        "--global-root",
    76→        default="",
    77→        help="Override the user-level global transcript root. Defaults to ~/.memorytree/transcripts.",
    78→    )
    79→    parser.add_argument(
    80→        "--raw-upload-permission",
    81→        choices=("not-set", "approved", "denied"),
    82→        default="not-set",
    83→        help="Current repository permission for committing raw transcript files.",
    84→    )
    85→    parser.add_argument("--format", choices=("text", "json"), default="text", help="Output format.")
    86→    return parser.parse_args()
    87→
    88→
    89→def resolve_global_root(path_value: str) -> Path:
    90→    if path_value:
    91→        return Path(path_value).expanduser().resolve()
    92→    return default_global_transcript_root()
    93→
    94→
    95→def format_result_text(result: dict[str, object]) -> str:
    96→    lines = [
    97→        f"client: {result['client']}",
    98→        f"project: {result['project']}",
    99→        f"session_id: {result['session_id']}",
   100→        f"started_at: {result['started_at']}",

    29→class FindExternalPolicySourcesTests(unittest.TestCase):
    30→    def test_detects_policy_bearing_github_contributing(self) -> None:
    31→        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:

    33→            path = root / ".github" / "CONTRIBUTING.md"

    45→
    46→            self.assertEqual(find_external_policy_sources(root), [])

    30→FULL_EN_AGENTS = """\
    31→# AGENTS.md
    32→
    33→## Read Order
    34→- Read this file first.
    35→- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.
    36→- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.
    37→- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.
    38→- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.
    39→
    40→## Memory Rules
    41→- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.
    42→- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.
    43→
    44→## Git Rules
    45→- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.
    46→- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes.
    47→- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title: `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`.
    48→- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.

1→"""Transcript parsing — dataclasses, client inference, and format-specific parsers."""
     2→
     3→from __future__ import annotations
     4→
     5→import json
     6→from dataclasses import dataclass
     7→from pathlib import Path
     8→from typing import Any
     9→
    10→from _transcript_common import *  # noqa: F401,F403
    11→from _transcript_common import (
    12→    SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES,
    13→    TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES,
    14→    TOOL_RESULT_TYPES,
    15→    TOOL_USE_TYPES,
    16→    deduplicate_messages,
    17→    deduplicate_tool_events,
    18→    earliest_timestamp,
    19→    ensure_dict,
    20→    ensure_list,
    21→    extract_gemini_text,
    22→    extract_text_blocks,
    23→    find_first_mapping_with_keys,
    24→    get_nested,
    25→    join_paragraphs,
    26→    load_jsonl,
    27→    normalize_timestamp,
    28→    summarize_value,
    29→)
    30→
    31→
    32→@dataclass
    33→class TranscriptMessage:
    34→    role: str
    35→    text: str
    36→    timestamp: str | None = None
    37→
    38→
    39→@dataclass
    40→class TranscriptToolEvent:
    41→    summary: str
    42→    timestamp: str | None = None
    43→
    44→
    45→@dataclass
    46→class ParsedTranscript:
    47→    client: str
    48→    session_id: str
    49→    title: str
    50→    started_at: str
    51→    cwd: str
    52→    branch: str
    53→    messages: list[TranscriptMessage]
    54→    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent]
    55→    source_path: Path
    56→
    57→
    58→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    59→# Client inference + dispatch
    60→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    61→
    62→
    63→def infer_client(client: str, source: Path) -> str:
    64→    if client != "auto":
    65→        return client
    66→    normalized = source.as_posix().lower()
    67→    if "/.codex/" in normalized or "rollout-" in source.name.lower():
    68→        return "codex"
    69→    if "/.claude/" in normalized or "/projects/" in normalized:
    70→        return "claude"
    71→    if "/.gemini/" in normalized or "checkpoint" in normalized:
    72→        return "gemini"
    73→    raise SystemExit(f"could not infer transcript client from source path: {source}")
    74→
    75→
    76→def parse_transcript(client: str, source: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
    77→    if client == "codex":
    78→        return parse_codex_transcript(source)
    79→    if client == "claude":
    80→        return parse_claude_transcript(source)

1→# memorytree-workflow Skill 开发待办
     2→
     3→## 背景
     4→
     5→本仓库是 MemoryTree 记忆系统的 Skill 实现，从 `beyondchenlin/memorytree` 独立拆出。
     6→消费端项目（普通项目）通过安装此 Skill 获得记忆管理能力。
     7→
     8→## 当前核心问题
     9→
    10→大模型不可靠 — 会忘记执行 chat_log 记录、transcript 导入等机械性流程。
    11→需要把这些确定性工作交给后台进程，大模型只做轻量的摘要和状态更新。
    12→
    13→## 架构决策
    14→
    15→### 定时心跳（单次执行 + OS 调度，零 token 消耗）
    16→- 全局单实例: 1 台电脑 = 1 个定时任务，扫描所有项目
    17→- 定时扫描客户端 transcript 目录（~/.claude/projects/、~/.codex/sessions/、~/.gemini/）
    18→- 每次执行: 扫描 → 增量导入 → 清洗 → git commit + push → 退出
    19→- 心跳间隔可配置（默认 5 分钟）
    20→- 运行方式: OS 原生定时任务（cron / launchd / Task Scheduler），tmux 仅用于开发调试
    21→- Git 策略: **默认 auto_push = true**（记忆数据安全优先，防止本地丢失）
    22→
    23→### 大模型（对话时才介入，省 token）
    24→- 只写当轮 chat_log 摘要（几行文字）
    25→- 只更新 goal/todo 状态
    26→- 不负责 transcript 导入、清洗、提交
    27→
    28→---
    29→
    30→## 待办任务（按优先级排序）
    31→
    32→### P0: 定时心跳 — 核心阻塞项
    33→
    34→> 验收标准: 全局单实例 heartbeat，OS 定时任务驱动，自动发现新 transcript 并完成导入 + commit + push，无需人工介入。
    35→
    36→- [ ] **运行架构**: 单次执行 + OS 原生调度
    37→  - 核心脚本 `heartbeat.py`: 跑一次扫描就退出（无状态、幂等）
    38→  - OS 定时任务每 5 分钟调用一次
    39→  - `memorytree-daemon install`: 自动检测 OS，注册定时任务
    40→  - `memorytree-daemon run-once`: 手动执行一次（调试用）
    41→  - `memorytree-daemon watch`: tmux 循环模式（开发调试用）
    42→  - `memorytree-daemon uninstall`: 移除定时任务
    43→- [ ] **首次安装触发**: Skill 激活时若 daemon 未注册，交互式询问用户配置偏好（间隔、auto_push、范围），确认后执行 install。询问方式必须兼容所有支持 Skill 的大模型（Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI），不依赖特定客户端的 UI 组件
    44→- [ ] **实现 heartbeat 主逻辑**: 调用 `discover-transcripts.py` 扫描三个客户端目录
    45→- [ ] **增量导入**: 发现新 transcript 时调用 `import-transcripts.py`
    46→- [ ] **敏感信息预检**: 清洗阶段扫描常见敏感模式（API key、password、token），发现时标记警告写入日志（不自动删除，避免误伤）
    47→- [ ] **自动 git 提交 + 推送**:
    48→  - `git status --porcelain Memory/` → 无变动则跳过
    49→  - 有变动 → `git add Memory/` → `git commit` → `git push`
    50→  - **默认 auto_push = true**（记忆是用户资产，本地丢失不可恢复）
    51→  - 首次安装时提示用户确认 push 行为，之后静默执行
    52→  - 提交到当前分支（遵循项目已有的分支策略，不自动创建新分支）
    53→- [ ] **git remote 前置检查**:
    54→  - push 前检测 remote 是否存在
    55→  - 无 remote → 跳过 push，记录到日志，下次 Skill 激活时提醒用户配置
    56→- [ ] **配置文件** (`~/.memorytree/config.toml`，全局唯一):
    57→  - 心跳间隔（默认 300s）
    58→  - 监听目录列表（默认三个客户端目录）
    59→  - 已注册项目列表（自动发现或手动添加）
    60→  - auto_push 开关（默认 true）
    61→  - log_level（默认 info）
    62→- [ ] **运维能力**:
    63→  - 日志输出到 `~/.memorytree/logs/heartbeat.log`（按日轮转）
    64→  - 锁文件互斥（防止上一次还没跑完，下一次又启动）
    65→  - push 失败时记录到日志，下次重试（网络中断不丢数据）
    66→  - **错误通知**: 连续失败 3 次后，写入 `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`，下次 Skill 激活时展示给用户
    67→  - **锁机制**: PID-based lock file，stale lock 通过检测进程存活自动回收
    68→- [ ] **测试用例**:
    69→  - 单元测试: 配置加载、增量检测逻辑、锁文件互斥
    70→  - 集成测试: 模拟新 transcript 出现 → 验证自动导入 + commit
    71→
    72→### P0.5: 跨会话上下文恢复 — 核心用户价值
    73→
    74→> 验收标准: 用户在新会话中说"看看最近的聊天"，Skill 即时同步最新 transcript，定位本项目最近一次会话，输出延续摘要，用户可无缝继续上次未完成的工作。
    75→
    76→**场景**: 用户在会话 A 中讨论了很长时间但问题未解决，关闭后开新会话 B，不想重新描述所有背景。
    77→
    78→**覆盖范围**: 三个客户端（Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI），支持跨客户端上下文恢复。例如 Codex 会话 → Claude Code 新会话。
    79→
    80→- [ ] **即时同步路径**（不依赖心跳定时）:
    81→  - 用户请求时立即扫描三个客户端的 transcript 目录
    82→  - 增量导入到全局归档（`~/.memorytree/transcripts/`）和项目镜像（`Memory/06_transcripts/`）
    83→  - 轻量级单项目同步，不需要全量扫描所有已注册项目
    84→- [ ] **定位最近会话**:
    85→  - 查询全局索引（`sessions.jsonl` / `search.sqlite`）
    86→  - 过滤条件: `project = 当前目录` + `client IN (claude, codex, gemini)`
    87→  - 按 timestamp 降序排列
    88→  - 排除当前会话自身（基于 Skill 激活时间戳：`started_at` >= 激活时间的 transcript 视为当前会话，跨客户端通用）
    89→- [ ] **延续摘要生成**（消耗 model token，但价值远大于用户手动重述）:
    90→  - 读取定位到的 transcript（优先 clean，精确确认查 raw）
    91→  - 结合 `Memory/03_chat_logs/` 已有的会话日志补充上下文
    92→  - 提取:
    93→    - 在讨论什么问题？
    94→    - 尝试了哪些方案？
    95→    - 走到了哪一步？
    96→    - 什么没有解决？最后卡在哪里？
    97→  - 输出来源标注（客户端、时间、时长）
    98→- [ ] **On Activation 主动检测**（可选增强）:
    99→  - Skill 激活时自动检测是否有未同步的新 transcript 属于当前项目
   100→  - 有则主动提示: "发现你上次在这个项目有一个未完成的会话（Codex, 2h ago），要查看摘要吗？"
   101→  - 不等用户主动询问，降低使用门槛
   102→- [ ] **扩展查询能力**（后续迭代）:
   103→  - "最近几次的聊天"（不限于一次）
   104→  - "上次讨论部署的那次"（按主题查找）
   105→  - 跨项目查找: "我在其他项目里讨论过这个问题吗？"
   106→
   107→### 跨客户端兼容性原则
   108→
   109→> 此原则适用于所有 P0–P3 任务中涉及交互提示的部分。
   110→
   111→MemoryTree Skill 可被 Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI 等多个 AI 助手加载。所有交互行为必须:

   117→5. **scripts 的 CLI 接口保持统一**: 无论被哪个客户端调用，参数和输出格式一致
   118→
   119→### P1: 代码质量 — 降低维护成本
   120→
   121→> 验收标准: `_transcript_utils.py` 拆分为 ≤400 行的模块；CI 流水线自动运行测试。
   122→
   123→- [x] **拆分 `_transcript_utils.py`**（已完成，2aea9da）:
   124→  - `_transcript_common.py`(257L) — 常量、通用工具函数、文本提取

   131→- [x] **transcript 去重修复**（已完成）:
   132→  - `_transcript_common.py` 新增 `deduplicate_messages()` / `deduplicate_tool_events()`（sha256 前缀签名）
   133→  - 三个解析器统一在构建 `ParsedTranscript` 前调用去重；Gemini 移除内联 `message_signatures`
   134→  - 17 个回归测试（单元 + 三客户端集成），全量 76 测试通过

Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive understanding. Let me create a detailed exploration report:

## Exploration Complete: memorytree-workflow Repository Analysis

I've conducted a thorough exploration of the memorytree-workflow repository. Here are my findings:

### 1. **Existing CI Configuration: NONE**
- **No `.github/workflows/` directory** exists
- **No Makefile, tox.ini, setup.py, setup.cfg, pyproject.toml** found
- **No CI/CD automation currently in place**
- This is the main gap being tracked in TODO.md under P1 ("CI 流水线")

### 2. **Python Project Configuration**
- **Target**: Python 3.11+ (explicitly required for `tomllib` stdlib in 3.11+)
- **No dependency management**: Scripts use only Python standard library (explicitly stated design principle: "Minimal dependencies")
- **No package distribution**: Not set up for PyPI or pip installation
- **Installation method**: Git clone directly to `~/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow`

### 3. **Test Infrastructure Analysis**

**Test Files**:
- `/tests/test_transcript_utils.py` (626 lines) — 70+ test cases covering parsing, deduplication, import logic
- `/tests/test_scaffold_utils.py` — 200+ lines, tests directory scaffolding
- `/tests/test_locale_utils.py` — Tests locale detection/normalization  
- `/tests/test_upgrade_checks.py` — Tests upgrade state detection

**Test Runner**: 
- **unittest** (standard library) — all test files use `unittest.TestCase`
- **Not pytest** — no pytest fixtures or conftest.py

"""
Discover local Codex, Claude Code, and Gemini transcript sources and import them
into MemoryTree using deterministic code-based cleaning.
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import json
from pathlib import Path

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Import one local AI transcript into MemoryTree using deterministic code-based
cleaning. Current-project sources mirror into both the repo and the user-level
global archive; unrelated sources archive globally only.
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import json
from pathlib import Path

from _transcript_discover import (
    default_global_transcript_root,
    infer_project_slug,
    transcript_matches_repo,
)
from _transcript_import import import_transcript, transcript_has_content
from _transcript_parse import CLIENTS, infer_client, parse_transcript, slugify


def main() -> int:
    args = parse_args()
    root = Path(args.root).resolve()
    source = Path(args.source).resolve()
    if not root.exists():
        raise SystemExit(f"root does not exist: {root}")
    if not source.exists():
        raise SystemExit(f"source transcript does not exist: {source}")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Upgrade a repository to MemoryTree without overwriting existing repo policy files.
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import json
import re
from pathlib import Path

from _locale_utils import normalize_locale
from _scaffold_utils import (
    build_datetime,
    create_memory_dirs,
    find_external_policy_sources,
    find_latest_chat_log_file,
    find_latest_goal_file,
    find_latest_todo_file,
    resolve_scaffold_paths,
    resolve_template_dir,
    scaffold_content_files,
    write_template,
)


def main() -> int:
    args = parse_args()
    root = Path(args.root).resolve()

Design an implementation plan for two sequential tasks in the memorytree-workflow repo (D:\demo1\memorytree-workflow).

## Context

This is a Python project (stdlib only, no external deps) with:
- Scripts in `scripts/` — all internal modules use underscore prefix (`_transcript_common.py`, etc.)
- Tests in `tests/` — 4 test files using `unittest.TestCase`, run via `uv run python tests/test_*.py`
- No CI, no pyproject.toml, no requirements.txt currently
- Python 3.11+ required (for `tomllib`)
- Git repo at github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow, master branch
- Conventional commits (feat, fix, docs, test, ci, etc.)

## Task A: P1 Remaining — CI Pipeline + Integration Tests

### A1: GitHub Actions CI Pipeline
From TODO.md:
- Python 3.11+ matrix testing (Linux/macOS/Windows)
- Test coverage report (target ≥ 80%)

Design a `.github/workflows/ci.yml` that:
- Triggers on push to master and PRs
- Matrix: Python 3.11, 3.12, 3.13 × ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest
- Runs all tests in `tests/` directory
- Coverage via `coverage` module (stdlib-compatible, or use `coverage` pip package)
- No external test deps needed — tests use unittest

Key consideration: Tests need `scripts/` on sys.path. Each test file does `sys.path.insert(0, str(SCRIPTS_DIR))` internally, so `uv run python -m unittest discover -s tests` or running files directly should work.

Actually, the project uses `uv` (already installed on the machine). Consider whether CI should use `uv run` or just plain `python`. Since there are no dependencies, plain `python` with `pip install coverage` is simplest.

### A2: Integration Tests
From TODO.md:
- init → upgrade → import end-to-end flow
- discover batch scan flow

Existing test patterns:
- `test_transcript_utils.py` — uses `tempfile.TemporaryDirectory()`, imports from `_transcript_utils`
- `test_scaffold_utils.py` — tests scaffolding functions
- `test_upgrade_checks.py` — uses `importlib.util` to import from `upgrade-memorytree.py` (hyphenated filename)
- `test_locale_utils.py` — tests locale

For integration tests, we need to test the full pipeline:
1. **Init → Upgrade → Import**: Create temp dir → run init-memorytree → verify structure → run upgrade-memorytree → verify no overwrites → create mock transcript → run import-transcripts → verify files created
2. **Discover batch scan**: Create mock transcript files in temp dirs mimicking client layouts → run discover logic → verify all found

These should go in a new file `tests/test_integration.py` to separate from unit tests.

Scripts use argparse + `main()` functions. For testing, we can either:
- Import the script modules and call functions directly (like test_upgrade_checks.py does with importlib.util)
- Use subprocess to run them as CLI commands

The importlib approach is cleaner for testing. But since init/upgrade/import scripts all have `main()` functions, we could also test by importing them.

## Task B: P0 Heartbeat Daemon

This is already partially implemented! From the exploration, `heartbeat.py` and `memorytree_daemon.py` already exist in `scripts/`. The TODO says P0 is "not started" but the files exist.

Before planning P0 in detail, note that the user's TODO.md has extensive requirements for P0. The plan should focus on what still needs to be done vs what's already scaffolded.

Key P0 deliverables from TODO.md:
1. `heartbeat.py`: single execution scan → import → clean → commit → push → exit
2. `memorytree_daemon.py`: install/uninstall/run-once/watch/status CLI
3. Config file `~/.memorytree/config.toml`
4. Lock file PID-based mutual exclusion
5. Logging to `~/.memorytree/logs/heartbeat.log`
6. Error alerting via `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`
7. Git auto-commit + push with remote pre-check
8. Sensitive info pre-scan
9. First-install interactive setup
10. Tests (unit + integration)

Since P0 is very large and complex, the plan should break it into phases.

Please provide a detailed implementation plan covering both Task A and Task B, with file lists, key design decisions, and verification steps.

content.content:
1→# memorytree-workflow Skill 开发待办
     2→
     3→## 背景
     4→
     5→本仓库是 MemoryTree 记忆系统的 Skill 实现，从 `beyondchenlin/memorytree` 独立拆出。
     6→消费端项目（普通项目）通过安装此 Skill 获得记忆管理能力。
     7→
     8→## 当前核心问题
     9→
    10→大模型不可靠 — 会忘记执行 chat_log 记录、transcript 导入等机械性流程。
    11→需要把这些确定性工作交给后台进程，大模型只做轻量的摘要和状态更新。
    12→
    13→## 架构决策
    14→
    15→### 定时心跳（单次执行 + OS 调度，零 token 消耗）
    16→- 全局单实例: 1 台电脑 = 1 个定时任务，扫描所有项目
    17→- 定时扫描客户端 transcript 目录（~/.claude/projects/、~/.codex/sessions/、~/.gemini/）
    18→- 每次执行: 扫描 → 增量导入 → 清洗 → git commit + push → 退出
    19→- 心跳间隔可配置（默认 5 分钟）
    20→- 运行方式: OS 原生定时任务（cron / launchd / Task Scheduler），tmux 仅用于开发调试
    21→- Git 策略: **默认 auto_push = true**（记忆数据安全优先，防止本地丢失）
    22→
    23→### 大模型（对话时才介入，省 token）
    24→- 只写当轮 chat_log 摘要（几行文字）
    25→- 只更新 goal/todo 状态
    26→- 不负责 transcript 导入、清洗、提交
    27→
    28→---
    29→
    30→## 待办任务（按优先级排序）
    31→
    32→### P0: 定时心跳 — 核心阻塞项
    33→
    34→> 验收标准: 全局单实例 heartbeat，OS 定时任务驱动，自动发现新 transcript 并完成导入 + commit + push，无需人工介入。
    35→
    36→- [ ] **运行架构**: 单次执行 + OS 原生调度
    37→  - 核心脚本 `heartbeat.py`: 跑一次扫描就退出（无状态、幂等）
    38→  - OS 定时任务每 5 分钟调用一次
    39→  - `memorytree-daemon install`: 自动检测 OS，注册定时任务
    40→  - `memorytree-daemon run-once`: 手动执行一次（调试用）
    41→  - `memorytree-daemon watch`: tmux 循环模式（开发调试用）
    42→  - `memorytree-daemon uninstall`: 移除定时任务
    43→- [ ] **首次安装触发**: Skill 激活时若 daemon 未注册，交互式询问用户配置偏好（间隔、auto_push、范围），确认后执行 install。询问方式必须兼容所有支持 Skill 的大模型（Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI），不依赖特定客户端的 UI 组件
    44→- [ ] **实现 heartbeat 主逻辑**: 调用 `discover-transcripts.py` 扫描三个客户端目录
    45→- [ ] **增量导入**: 发现新 transcript 时调用 `import-transcripts.py`
    46→- [ ] **敏感信息预检**: 清洗阶段扫描常见敏感模式（API key、password、token），发现时标记警告写入日志（不自动删除，避免误伤）
    47→- [ ] **自动 git 提交 + 推送**:
    48→  - `git status --porcelain Memory/` → 无变动则跳过
    49→  - 有变动 → `git add Memory/` → `git commit` → `git push`
    50→  - **默认 auto_push = true**（记忆是用户资产，本地丢失不可恢复）
    51→  - 首次安装时提示用户确认 push 行为，之后静默执行
    52→  - 提交到当前分支（遵循项目已有的分支策略，不自动创建新分支）
    53→- [ ] **git remote 前置检查**:
    54→  - push 前检测 remote 是否存在
    55→  - 无 remote → 跳过 push，记录到日志，下次 Skill 激活时提醒用户配置
    56→- [ ] **配置文件** (`~/.memorytree/config.toml`，全局唯一):
    57→  - 心跳间隔（默认 300s）
    58→  - 监听目录列表（默认三个客户端目录）
    59→  - 已注册项目列表（自动发现或手动添加）
    60→  - auto_push 开关（默认 true）
    61→  - log_level（默认 info）
    62→- [ ] **运维能力**:
    63→  - 日志输出到 `~/.memorytree/logs/heartbeat.log`（按日轮转）
    64→  - 锁文件互斥（防止上一次还没跑完，下一次又启动）
    65→  - push 失败时记录到日志，下次重试（网络中断不丢数据）
    66→  - **错误通知**: 连续失败 3 次后，写入 `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`，下次 Skill 激活时展示给用户
    67→  - **锁机制**: PID-based lock file，stale lock 通过检测进程存活自动回收
    68→- [ ] **测试用例**:
    69→  - 单元测试: 配置加载、增量检测逻辑、锁文件互斥
    70→  - 集成测试: 模拟新 transcript 出现 → 验证自动导入 + commit
    71→
    72→### P0.5: 跨会话上下文恢复 — 核心用户价值
    73→
    74→> 验收标准: 用户在新会话中说"看看最近的聊天"，Skill 即时同步最新 transcript，定位本项目最近一次会话，输出延续摘要，用户可无缝继续上次未完成的工作。
    75→
    76→**场景**: 用户在会话 A 中讨论了很长时间但问题未解决，关闭后开新会话 B，不想重新描述所有背景。
    77→
    78→**覆盖范围**: 三个客户端（Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI），支持跨客户端上下文恢复。例如 Codex 会话 → Claude Code 新会话。
    79→
    80→- [ ] **即时同步路径**（不依赖心跳定时）:
    81→  - 用户请求时立即扫描三个客户端的 transcript 目录
    82→  - 增量导入到全局归档（`~/.memorytree/transcripts/`）和项目镜像（`Memory/06_transcripts/`）
    83→  - 轻量级单项目同步，不需要全量扫描所有已注册项目
    84→- [ ] **定位最近会话**:
    85→  - 查询全局索引（`sessions.jsonl` / `search.sqlite`）
    86→  - 过滤条件: `project = 当前目录` + `client IN (claude, codex, gemini)`
    87→  - 按 timestamp 降序排列
    88→  - 排除当前会话自身（基于 Skill 激活时间戳：`started_at` >= 激活时间的 transcript 视为当前会话，跨客户端通用）
    89→- [ ] **延续摘要生成**（消耗 model token，但价值远大于用户手动重述）:
    90→  - 读取定位到的 transcript（优先 clean，精确确认查 raw）
    91→  - 结合 `Memory/03_chat_logs/` 已有的会话日志补充上下文
    92→  - 提取:
    93→    - 在讨论什么问题？
    94→    - 尝试了哪些方案？
    95→    - 走到了哪一步？
    96→    - 什么没有解决？最后卡在哪里？
    97→  - 输出来源标注（客户端、时间、时长）
    98→- [ ] **On Activation 主动检测**（可选增强）:
    99→  - Skill 激活时自动检测是否有未同步的新 transcript 属于当前项目
   100→  - 有则主动提示: "发现你上次在这个项目有一个未完成的会话（Codex, 2h ago），要查看摘要吗？"
   101→  - 不等用户主动询问，降低使用门槛
   102→- [ ] **扩展查询能力**（后续迭代）:
   103→  - "最近几次的聊天"（不限于一次）
   104→  - "上次讨论部署的那次"（按主题查找）
   105→  - 跨项目查找: "我在其他项目里讨论过这个问题吗？"
   106→
   107→### 跨客户端兼容性原则
   108→
   109→> 此原则适用于所有 P0–P3 任务中涉及交互提示的部分。
   110→
   111→MemoryTree Skill 可被 Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI 等多个 AI 助手加载。所有交互行为必须:
   112→
   113→1. **不依赖特定客户端的 UI 组件**: 不使用 Claude Code 独有的 AskUserQuestion 多选框等控件，只使用纯文本对话
   114→2. **提示语言跟随用户/repo locale**: 不硬编码中英文
   115→3. **用自然语言提问 + 等待用户回复**: 所有确认步骤都是"提问 → 等待回答 → 行动"，不依赖 button/checkbox
   116→4. **AGENTS.md 模板中的规则必须是客户端无关的**: 不引用 Claude Code 专有概念（如 MCP、Skill tool 等）
   117→5. **scripts 的 CLI 接口保持统一**: 无论被哪个客户端调用，参数和输出格式一致
   118→
   119→### P1: 代码质量 — 降低维护成本
   120→
   121→> 验收标准: `_transcript_utils.py` 拆分为 ≤400 行的模块；CI 流水线自动运行测试。
   122→
   123→- [x] **拆分 `_transcript_utils.py`**（已完成，2aea9da）:
   124→  - `_transcript_common.py`(257L) — 常量、通用工具函数、文本提取
   125→  - `_transcript_parse.py`(352L) — 数据类 + 三客户端解析（Codex/Claude/Gemini）
   126→  - `_transcript_import.py`(213L) — 导入、清洗、manifest 生成
   127→  - `_transcript_index.py`(100L) — SQLite 索引操作
   128→  - `_transcript_discover.py`(100L) — 文件发现、项目匹配
   129→  - `_transcript_utils.py`(123L) — 向后兼容 re-export 层
   130→  - 消费方脚本已更新为直接导入具体模块，59 个测试全部通过
   131→- [x] **transcript 去重修复**（已完成）:
   132→  - `_transcript_common.py` 新增 `deduplicate_messages()` / `deduplicate_tool_events()`（sha256 前缀签名）
   133→  - 三个解析器统一在构建 `ParsedTranscript` 前调用去重；Gemini 移除内联 `message_signatures`
   134→  - 17 个回归测试（单元 + 三客户端集成），全量 76 测试通过
   135→- [ ] **CI 流水线** (GitHub Actions):
   136→  - Python 3.11+ 矩阵测试（Linux/macOS/Windows）
   137→  - 测试覆盖率报告（目标 ≥ 80%）
   138→- [ ] **集成测试补充**:
   139→  - init → upgrade → import 端到端流程
   140→  - discover 批量扫描流程
   141→
   142→### P2: 大模型职责最小化 — 依赖 P0 完成
   143→
   144→> 验收标准: SKILL.md 明确标注哪些工作由 heartbeat 负责；transcript 处理段落标记为"大模型不执行"。
   145→
   146→- [ ] **更新 SKILL.md On Activation 段**:
   147→  - 明确大模型只负责: chat_log 摘要 + goal/todo 更新
   148→  - 明确 heartbeat 负责: transcript 发现/导入/清洗/提交
   149→- [ ] **添加定时任务状态检测**:
   150→  - On Activation 时检测定时任务是否已注册（检查 crontab / launchd plist / schtasks）
   151→  - 未注册则提示用户运行 `memorytree-daemon install`
   152→  - 读取 `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`，展示累积的错误通知
   153→
   154→### P3: 分发与兼容 — 降低使用门槛
   155→
   156→> 验收标准: 用户可通过 `pip install` 或 `uv add` 安装；跨平台路径正确。
   157→
   158→- [ ] **项目包化**:
   159→  - 添加 `pyproject.toml`（含版本号、入口点、依赖声明）
   160→  - CLI 入口: `memorytree-daemon install|uninstall|run-once|watch|status`
   161→- [ ] **跨平台路径兼容**:
   162→  - Windows: `%APPDATA%` / `%LOCALAPPDATA%` 路径适配
   163→  - 测试矩阵覆盖 Windows/macOS/Linux
   164→- [ ] **安装文档更新**:
   165→  - pip install 方式
   166→  - Claude Code skill 安装方式
   167→  - 各平台定时任务注册说明（自动 install 失败时的手动方案）
   168→
   169→---
   170→
   171→## 任务依赖关系
   172→
   173→```
   174→P0 (heartbeat) ──→ P2 (职责最小化，需要 heartbeat 就绪)
   175→P0 (heartbeat) ──→ P3 (打包需包含 heartbeat)
   176→P0.5 (上下文恢复) 可与 P0 并行（复用现有 discover + import + SQLite，不需要 daemon）
   177→P1 (代码拆分) 可与 P0 并行（代码质量优化，非硬依赖）
   178→跨客户端兼容性原则 ─贯穿→ 所有交互设计
   179→```
   180→
   181→建议执行顺序: **P0 heartbeat + P0.5 上下文恢复（并行） → P1 拆分 → P2 职责更新 → P3 分发**
   182→
   183→## 环境要求
   184→
   185→- **Python 3.11+**（`tomllib` 为 3.11+ stdlib，无需第三方 TOML 包）
   186→- Python 3.9 已于 2025 年 10 月 EOL，3.10 将于 2026 年 10 月 EOL
   187→
   188→---
   189→
   190→## 相关仓库
   191→
   192→- 消费端项目: `beyondchenlin/memorytree`（目标 v002 已创建）
   193→- 本仓库: `beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow`
   194→
   195→## 现有脚本（可复用）
   196→
   197→| 脚本 | 用途 |
   198→|------|------|
   199→| init-memorytree.py | 新项目初始化记忆目录结构 |
   200→| upgrade-memorytree.py | 安全升级已有项目 |
   201→| import-transcripts.py | 单文件 transcript 导入（raw → clean → manifest → SQLite） |
   202→| discover-transcripts.py | 批量扫描三个客户端的 transcript |
   203→| detect-memorytree-locale.py | 检测项目语言环境 |
   204→
   205→## 远期愿景: OpenMnemo
   206→
   207→以 Gitea 为底座的 SaaS 记忆平台，跨平台 AI 对话聚合 + 语义检索 + Git 版本管理。
   208→项目名 OpenMnemo（来自希腊记忆女神 Mnemosyne），域名和 GitHub org 全线可用。
   209→
   210→预研课题（待独立为单独文档）:
   211→- [ ] Gitea API 批量写入验证（POST /api/v1/repos/{owner}/{repo}/contents）
   212→- [ ] 多租户仓库结构设计（每用户一个 Git 仓库）
   213→- [ ] 语义检索方案: BM25 (SQLite FTS5) + 向量搜索
   214→- [ ] 浏览器插件可行性: 从 ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini 网页版采集对话

    67→class BuildDatetimeTests(unittest.TestCase):

    69→        result = build_datetime("2026-03-14", "09:30")
    70→        self.assertEqual(result, datetime(2026, 3, 14, 9, 30))

    76→    def test_time_only(self) -> None:
    77→        result = build_datetime("", "14:30")
    78→        self.assertEqual(result.hour, 14)
    79→        self.assertEqual(result.minute, 30)
    80→
    81→    def test_neither_returns_now(self) -> None:
    82→        before = datetime.now()
    83→        result = build_datetime("", "")
    84→        after = datetime.now()
    85→        self.assertGreaterEqual(result, before)
    86→        self.assertLessEqual(result, after)

    16→class NormalizeLocaleTests(unittest.TestCase):
    17→    def test_explicit_en(self) -> None:
    18→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("en"), "en")
    19→
    20→    def test_explicit_zh_cn(self) -> None:
    21→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("zh-cn"), "zh-cn")
    22→
    23→    def test_alias_en_us(self) -> None:
    24→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("en-us"), "en")
    25→
    26→    def test_alias_en_gb(self) -> None:
    27→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("en-gb"), "en")
    28→
    29→    def test_alias_zh(self) -> None:
    30→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("zh"), "zh-cn")
    31→
    32→    def test_alias_zh_hant(self) -> None:
    33→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("zh-hant"), "zh-cn")
    34→
    35→    def test_alias_zh_tw(self) -> None:
    36→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("zh-tw"), "zh-cn")
    37→
    38→    def test_alias_zh_sg(self) -> None:
    39→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("zh-sg"), "zh-cn")
    40→
    41→    def test_case_insensitive(self) -> None:
    42→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("EN"), "en")
    43→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("ZH-CN"), "zh-cn")
    44→
    45→    def test_empty_falls_back_to_system(self) -> None:
    46→        result = normalize_locale("")
    47→        self.assertIn(result, ("en", "zh-cn"))
    48→
    49→    def test_auto_falls_back(self) -> None:
    50→        result = normalize_locale("auto")
    51→        self.assertIn(result, ("en", "zh-cn"))
    52→
    53→    def test_unknown_locale_returned_as_is(self) -> None:
    54→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("fr"), "fr")
    55→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("ja"), "ja")
